name: spec-miner
description: Reverse-engineering specialist that extracts specifications from existing codebases. Use when working with legacy or undocumented systems, inherited projects, or old codebases with no documentation. Invoke to map code dependencies, generate API documentation from source, identify undocumented business logic, figure out what code does, or create architecture documentation from implementation. Trigger phrases: reverse engineer, old codebase, no docs, no documentation, figure out how this works, in
author: jeffallan
summary_zh: 这是一款代码逆向分析工具，专门对付没文档的老项目和遗留系统。它能帮你理清代码逻辑并自动生成文档，让你快速弄懂祖传代码到底在干嘛。
